title: optimise $alu cells with known propagate/generate states

features.name: large_width_alu_with_byte_isolated_carries
features.description: Code should include a multi-bit ALU operation where a bitmask prevents carry propagation between byte boundaries, enabling carry chain bisection optimization
features.snippet: wire [63:0] tmp = i & 64'hFEFEFEFEFEFEFEFE; assign o = i & -i;

features.name: alu_static_propagate_generate_state
features.description: Code should include an ALU operation where some bit positions have known static states that prevent carry generation or propagation between bit groups
